articles.title: Dawn Staley controversially calls out WNBA reporter over Kate Martin post - Awful Announcing
articles.description: Dawn Staley created a stir by calling out a WNBA reporter for a seemingly innocuous post about Kate Martin being cut from the Valkyries.
